finance.summary: Financial markets reflect positive growth and strategic developments as corporations finalize 2025 results.
highlights: Northwestern Mutual recognized as a top independent broker-dealer with record 2025 performance, assets under management over $400B.
American Express reports strong 2025 results driven by customer loyalty and global network expansion.
Beyond Meat delays Q4/full-year 2025 reporting to March 31 due to internal control issues.
CVD Equipment Corporation schedules Q4/fiscal year 2025 report for March 30.

art.summary: Regional art initiatives and gallery retrospectives highlight community engagement and artistic exploration.
highlights: Dallas Design District launches 'The Art Docks' project, featuring 18 new outdoor murals.
UB Art Galleries announce a major retrospective of artist Clayton Pond, opening April 10.
GBH's Community Canvas features 'Tour de Force' by Christiane Corcelle, exploring discovery through layered digital art.
Ongoing 'Image Makers' exhibition at Oliver Art Center continues through March 28.
